cameras.title: Pitch cameras
cameras.subtitle: Calibrate each camera’s pitch boundary to unlock half-pitch framing and player features.
cameras.statusUnknown: Status unavailable — retrying on next visit

calibration.title: Pitch calibration
calibration.forbiddenBody: You need venue admin access to calibrate this camera.
calibration.noMeshBody: This camera has no registered de-warp mesh, so there is nothing to mark on. Meshes are registered when the venue’s panorama pipeline runs.
calibration.noFrameBody: A clean still of the pitch is produced automatically the next time a recording is processed for this camera. Check back after the next match.
calibration.loadErrorBody: Something failed while loading the camera view. Check your connection and retry.
calibration.proposalBanner: Corners were pre-placed from player activity. They sit inside the true lines — drag each corner out to the painted boundary.
calibration.proposalNoTracklets: No player-tracking data for this camera yet — place the corners manually.
calibration.proposalUnavailable: The corner suggestion couldn’t be loaded — you can still mark manually.
calibration.midlineOfferBody: Mark where the halfway line meets each touchline. It unlocks half-pitch recording framing.
calibration.nudgeHint: Drag a marker, or use the arrow keys to nudge it (Shift = 10px, Esc deselects). Scroll to zoom.
calibration.errUnprojectable: {mark} is outside the camera’s coverage — nudge it back inside the visible pitch.
calibration.errMeshUnavailable: The camera mesh couldn’t be fetched — an infrastructure issue, not your marks. Try again shortly.
calibration.errSaveFailed: Saving failed. Check your connection and try again.
calibration.redoNote: This calibration is now live. Adjusting and saving again replaces it.
calibration.redoNoteInactive: Saved for reference — NOT live. The previous calibration, if any, stays active. Adjust the marks and save again; if every mark is placed correctly, the camera model needs a refit first.
calibration.placingHint: Drag to look around and scroll or + to zoom in before clicking — precision here is what everything downstream inherits. The far side must be a touchline (a long side of the pitch).
calibration.leaveConfirm: Leave pitch calibration? Marks you placed here will be lost.
calibration.resultOk: Usable — camera fit is the limit
calibration.resultGoodHint: The boundary lands within a few pixels of your marks everywhere. You are done.
calibration.resultOkHint: Check each corner sits exactly on its line intersection. If the boundary still bends away from the paint BETWEEN well-placed marks, that is residual camera-model distortion, not your marking — the calibration works; framing features tolerate this level.
calibration.resultBadHint: The marks disagree strongly with a flat pitch — usually a corner is on the wrong point, or the far side is not a touchline. Start with {mark}. If every mark is placed correctly, the camera model itself needs a refit.

portrait.title: Portrait highlights
portrait.approvedNotice: Marked good enough — nothing was posted.
portrait.correctedHint: You fixed this framing in the editor. Still an unjudged draft — mark it good enough or reject it.
portrait.correctionsUnavailable: Correction markers unavailable — some clips may already be fixed.

tags.title: Event Tags
tags.emptyCanTag: No events tagged yet. Click "Add Tag" to get started.

goalCandidates.title: AI goal review
goalCandidates.hint: Detected kickoff moments in match order — each time shown is the detected kickoff; the goal plays out in the clip before it. About 1 in 3 is a real goal; approving adds a public goal marker to the timeline.
goalCandidates.confidenceTitle: Detector confidence: kickoff formation / dead-ball context
goalCandidates.approveRepairNotice: Approved, but the goal marker didn't save — approve again to finish
goalCandidates.staleNotice: This candidate was updated elsewhere — list refreshed
goalCandidates.goalHintTitle: Playback starts here — the goal follows within the episode (exact when the detected kickoff is the goal's own; later in merged multi-stoppage episodes)
goalCandidates.unapproveRepairNotice: The goal marker is still live — unapprove again to remove it
goalCandidates.addFailedNotice: The goal marker didn't save — try again
goalCandidates.addAtTime: Add goal marker at a match time
goalCandidates.cycleHintTitle: This episode contains another detected kickoff cycle — click to add a goal marker at ≈{mmss} (you can remove it after checking)
goalCandidates.dupeWarnNotice: A goal marker already exists at {existing} — likely the same goal seen from an overlapping card. Click again to add one at {target} anyway.
goalCandidates.clipTruncatedTitle: The review clip ends at {end} but the episode continues to {episodeEnd} — stamp goals after the cut with the match-time field
goalCandidates.cycleSeekTitle: Jump the clip to the cycle at ≈{mmss}
goalCandidates.likelyGoalTitle: Refiner confidence {pct}% — recorded signal only; review as usual

jerseyMap.duplicateError: Two players have the same jersey number — fix before saving.
jerseyMap.lockedSuccess: Locked {count, plural, one {# jersey assignment} other {# jersey assignments}}. Clip attribution running…
jerseyMap.savedSuccess: Saved {count, plural, one {# jersey assignment} other {# jersey assignments}}.
